2604.05987.title: Flowr -- Scaling Up Retail Supply Chain Operations Through Agentic AI in Large Scale Supermarket Chains
2604.05987.paper_summary: Retail supply chain operations in supermarket chains involve continuous, high-volume manual workflows spanning demand forecasting, procurement, supplier coordination, and inventory replenishment, processes that are repetitive, decision-intensive, and difficult to scale without significant human effort. Despite growing investment in data analytics, the decision-making and coordination layers of these workflows remain predominantly manual, reactive, and fragmented across outlets, distribution centers, and supplier networks. This paper introduces Flowr, a novel agentic AI framework for automating end-to-end retail supply chain workflows in large-scale supermarket operations. Flowr systematically decomposes manual supply chain operations into specialized AI agents, each responsible for a clearly defined cognitive role, enabling automation of processes previously dependent on continuous human coordination. To ensure task accuracy and adherence to responsible AI principles, the framework employs a consortium of fine-tuned, domain-specialized large language models coordinated by a central reasoning LLM. Central to the framework is a human-in-the-loop orchestration model in which supply chain managers supervise and intervene across workflow stages via a Model Context Protocol (MCP)-enabled interface, preserving accountability and organizational control. Evaluation demonstrates that Flowr significantly reduces manual coordination overhead, improves demand-supply alignment, and enables proactive exception handling at a scale unachievable through manual processes. The framework was validated in collaboration with a large-scale supermarket chain and is domain-independent, offering a generalizable blueprint for agentic AI-driven supply chain automation across large-scale enterprise settings.
2604.05987.paper_summary_zh: 零售供應鏈運營在超市連鎖中涉及持續、高容量的手動工作流程，涵蓋需求預測、採購、供應商協調和庫存補充，這些過程是重複的、決策密集的，且在沒有顯著人力投入的情況下難以擴展。儘管對數據分析的投資不斷增加，這些工作流程的決策和協調層仍然主要是手動的、反應性的，並且在各個門店、配送中心和供應商網絡之間是零散的。本文介紹了Flowr，一種新穎的代理 AI 框架，用於自動化大規模超市運營中的端到端零售供應鏈工作流程。Flowr系統性地將手動供應鏈操作分解為專門的AI代理，每個代理負責明確定義的認知角色，使得之前依賴於持續人力協調的過程實現自動化。為了確保任務的準確性和遵循負責任的AI原則，該框架採用了一個由中央推理LLM協調的微調、領域專門的大型語言模型聯盟。該框架的核心是一個人機協作的編排模型，供應鏈經理通過啟用模型上下文協議（MCP）的界面監督和干預工作流程的各個階段，保持問責制和組織控制。評估顯示，Flowr顯著減少了手動協調的開銷，改善了需求與供應的對齊，並在手動流程無法實現的規模上實現了主動的例外處理。該框架在與一家大型超市連鎖的合作中得到了驗證，並且是領域獨立的，為大規模企業環境中的代理AI驅動的供應鏈自動化提供了一個可普遍應用的藍圖。
2604.05987.author: Eranga Bandara et.al.
2604.05987.authors: Eranga Bandara, Ross Gore, Sachin Shetty, Piumi Siyambalapitiya, Sachini Rajapakse, Isurunima Kularathna, Pramoda Karunarathna, Ravi Mukkamala, Peter Foytik, Safdar H. Bouk, Abdul Rahman, Xueping Liang, Amin Hass, Tharaka Hewa, Ng Wee Keong, Kasun De Zoysa, Aruna Withanage, Nilaan Loganathan
